title: Transregnum
description:
Genre: Science Fiction, Dystopian, Political Ideology, Mixture of Steampunk and Cyberpunk Themed World

Duration: 3-5 hours

About: Text-Based, Linear Story, One Ending

Story

"In a world where honor is tainted and secrets run deep within three distinct units - The Foresight, The Ingenuity, and The Guardian, Garrett Marek finds himself entangled in a web of deception. A dystopian society ruled by Deus Magnus Rotamea who shapes it through Transregnum exam."

"As Garrett Marek navigates through treacherous challenges and confronts his past, a mysterious figure emerges to guide him to unravel the mysteries of his family's history. With allies turning into enemies and enemies lurking in the shadows, Garrett's journey takes him to the brink of despair and self-discovery. Will he be able to break free from the chains of fate and rewrite his own story by joining the resistance group called “The Fractured Gear”, or is he destined to be a pawn in a larger game of power and manipulation? Join Garrett on a thrilling and suspenseful adventure where nothing is as it seems, and every choice could lead to either salvation or destruction."

Features

• Linear Visual Novel 

• Fully voice-acted character dialogues.

• Original soundtracks available on SoundCloud.

• Approximately 48,000 words of text.

• Text-based, linear story with one definitive ending.

• Estimated reading time: 3-5 hours.

• Plus: The game’s book adaptation will be published soon!

• Bonus: Achievements will be updated post-release!
description_short: Step into a dystopian visual novel where secrets, betrayal, and self-discovery collide. Follow Garrett Marek's text-driven journey through a world ruled by Deus Magnus Rotamea. Unravel family mysteries, confront fate, and explore a linear story where every revelation brings you closer to the truth!
